chosen_action.title: Upgrade NxCode publisher discovery with a real runtime-sendable support email path

why_this_action.summary: The short review window is still active until 2026-05-25T07:20:16+02:00, so another live outbound action would mostly blur measurement. The highest-leverage same-run move was to improve the post-hold publisher lane by turning NxCode from a website-only/manual contact target into a runtime-sendable email-backed target using a public support address on official NxCode docs.
verification: Execution board showed no truthful do-now packet inside the active short review window and still listed NxCode as a non-runtime-sendable publisher blocker.
Official NxCode troubleshooting docs expose support@nxcode.io as a public contact path.
After the repair, the refreshed discovery artifact now includes support@nxcode.io and the execution board only lists ctxt.dev / Signum as still non-runtime-sendable.

expected_outcome: When the short hold expires after 2026-05-25T07:20:16+02:00, the post-hold marketer rerun has two direct-email-backed publisher targets (NxCode and TIMEWELL) instead of one.

measurement_window.success_metric: Post-hold execution surfaces NxCode or TIMEWELL as a truthful email-backed publisher lane or converts one of them into a real Codeberg-first outreach attempt.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the post-hold rerun still cannot produce a truthful executable publisher lane after this repair, escalate immediately to another distribution architecture repair instead of logging another idle hold.
